ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the manufacturer's ID */,
  "model" TEXT /* Specific model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Classification of the vehicle (e.g., compact, SUV) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vehicle model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the vehicle's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumptions" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "fuel_consumption_city" REAL /* Fuel consumption in city driving (L/100km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_hwy" REAL /* Fuel consumption on the highway (L/100km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (L/100km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption in MPG */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "range_city" REAL /* Estimated range in city driving in kilometers */,
  "range_hwy" REAL /* Estimated range on the highway in kilometers */,
  "range_comb" REAL /* Estimated combined range in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumptions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "co2_emissions" INTEGER /* Carbon dioxide emissions in grams per kilometer */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard of the vehicle (e.g., Euro 6, EPA) */,
  "co2_emission_city" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions in city driving in grams per kilometer */,
  "co2_emission_hwy" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions on the highway in grams per kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user's ID who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified field */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the modified field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
